ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's current status (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team's mascot */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the coach */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* List of previous teams the coach has coached */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements (e.g., championships, awards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee of the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcasted the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored */,
  "longest_run" INTEGER /* Longest rushing run */,
  "yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Average yards per attempt */,
  "field_position" TEXT /* Field position where the rush started */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., run, pass) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., gain, loss, touchdown) */,
  "down" TEXT /* Down on which the rush occurred */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to go for a first down */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time in the game when the rush occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_reports" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player with the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date for the player */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Specific part of the body affected */,
  "injury_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the injury in days */,
  "rehab_progress" TEXT /* Progress of the player's rehabilitation */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current status regarding the player's return (e.g., cleared, under observation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being reviewed */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach who made the review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the coach regarding the player's performance */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the coach (1-10) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the review (e.g., offense, defense, special teams) */,
  "areas_of_improvement" TEXT /* Specific areas where the player needs to improve */,
  "positive_feedback" TEXT /* Positive feedback from the coach */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video clip of the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship for the season */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that was the runner-up for the season */,
  "top_scorer_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored the most points in the season */,
  "top_rusher_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who had the most rushing yards in the season */,
  "top_passer_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who had the most passing yards in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_rusher_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_rusher_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_passer_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_passer_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_scorer_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_runner_up_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with these stats */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season for which these stats are recorded */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total rushing attempts over the season */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards over the season */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns over the season */,
  "average_yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Average yards per attempt over the season */,
  "total_receptions" INTEGER /* Total number of receptions over the season */,
  "total_passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards over the season */,
  "total_passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total passing touchdowns over the season */,
  "total_interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Total interceptions thrown over the season */,
  "total_sacks" INTEGER /* Total sacks over the season */,
  "total_tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles over the season */,
  "total_sacks_allowed" INTEGER /* Total sacks allowed over the season */,
  "total_interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions over the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last time the user performed an action on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view statistics) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
